backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor managing science notes (4 Hindi chapters on plants, body movements, light, electricity), game states, and high scores with CRUD operations and leaderboard queries.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining data types (ScienceNote, GameState, HighScore) and a run function to migrate old actor state to new actor with added gameStates and highScores maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implementation of four puzzle games (card matching, sliding puzzle, pattern memory, sequence memory) with difficulty progression, scoring, and high score tracking.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including game components, hooks, pages, translations, and styling for the brain training puzzle app with Hindi/English support.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes using neutral grays and accent colors for the brain training theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Educational Notes App.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, four puzzle games (card matching, sliding puzzle, pattern memory, sequence memory), and progress page wrapped in Layout.
frontend/src/components/Card.tsx: Flippable card component with 3D rotation animation, displaying card-back image when face-down and value when flipped, with disabled state for matched cards.
frontend/src/components/CardGrid.tsx: Responsive grid container rendering Card components in a dynamic grid layout based on gridSize prop with gap spacing and max-width constraints.
frontend/src/components/GameCard.tsx: Reusable game selection card displaying puzzle type with icon, description, current level badge, gradient color accent, and play button with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/GameControls.tsx: Game control buttons component providing restart and home navigation functionality with icons for use across puzzle game pages.
frontend/src/components/GameScore.tsx: A dialog component that displays game completion stats (time, moves, score) with trophy icon and buttons to play again or return to menu.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header (logo, navigation, login/logout), footer with attribution, and outlet for nested routes.
frontend/src/components/PatternGrid.tsx: Renders a dynamic grid of cells for pattern memory game, showing either the target pattern or user input based on game phase.
frontend/src/components/SequenceItem.tsx: A button component representing a single item in a sequence game with active, selected, and disabled states.
frontend/src/components/SlidingTile.tsx: A tile component for sliding puzzle game that displays a number or renders as empty space.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous actor for backend communication, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCardGame.ts: Hook managing card matching game state including card generation, flip logic, match detection, move counting, and game completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameTimer.ts: Hook providing a game timer with start, stop, and reset functionality, tracking elapsed time in milliseconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/usePatternMemory.ts: Hook managing pattern memory game with memorization and input phases, pattern generation, validation, and attempt tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching player game state and high scores, plus mutation for completing levels with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useScoreCalculation.t: Hook that calculates game score based on time taken, moves made, and level difficulty with time and move efficiency bonuses.
frontend/src/hooks/useSequenceMemory.ts: Custom hook managing sequence memory game state including sequence generation, display/input phases, user input tracking, and completion detection with configurable difficulty levels.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlidingPuzzle.ts: Custom hook for sliding puzzle game logic that generates solvable puzzles, handles tile movements, tracks moves, and checks for puzzle completion with configurable grid sizes.
frontend/src/hooks/useTranslation.ts: Empty file, likely placeholder for internationalization translation hook.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Empty file, likely placeholder for translation strings and localization data.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom brain training theme using purple/blue/pink color scheme, dark mode support, and CSS custom properties for design tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/CardMatchingGame.tsx: Card matching game page component that manages game state, timer, moves tracking, and integrates with backend to save level completion data.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page displaying four brain puzzle games (card matching, sliding puzzle, pattern memory, sequence memory) with descriptions and benefits section.
frontend/src/pages/LanguageSelectionPage: Empty file, likely placeholder for language selection interface.
frontend/src/pages/NotesPage.tsx: Empty file, likely placeholder for notes or documentation page.
frontend/src/pages/PatternMemoryGame.tsx: Pattern memory game page that displays patterns for memorization, handles user input phase, tracks attempts and time, and saves completion to backend.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressPage.tsx: Displays player progress including current level, score, time, unlocked puzzles, and high scores per puzzle type. Shows a login prompt for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/SequenceMemoryGame.ts: Implements the sequence memory game where players watch a sequence display then reproduce it by clicking items in order. Tracks attempts, time, and submits completion to backend.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for settings page functionality.
frontend/src/pages/SlidingPuzzleGame.tsx: Implements the sliding tile puzzle game where players rearrange numbered tiles into correct order. Tracks moves, time, and submits level completion to backend.
frontend/src/pages/SubjectsPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for subjects page functionality.
frontend/src/utils/difficultyConfig.ts: Defines difficulty configurations for all four game types (card matching, sliding puzzle, pattern memory, sequence memory) across 5 levels, specifying grid sizes, sequence lengths, pattern counts, and display times.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, container settings, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining a memory puzzle game with four puzzle types, progressive difficulty, Internet Identity authentication, and brain training focus. Includes architectural notes, feature list, and image requirements.
